'''yawate''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adverbs|adverb]] meaning "[[Wikt:debilitatedly|debilitatedly]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| y-w-sh
|-
! Word class
| [[Adverb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:debilitatedly|debilitatedly]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| yawate
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].[[present]] || [[word:yawate|yawate]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]] || [[word:yawatesher|yawatesher]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:yawatesherĂ«m|yawatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:yawatero|yawatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:yawateshĂ«|yawateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:yawateshĂ«m|yawateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokiyawatero|gokiyawatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokiyawateshĂ«|gokiyawateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokiyawateshĂ«m|gokiyawateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:goyawankerom|goyawankerom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goyawankeshĂ«|goyawankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goyawankeshĂ«m|goyawankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:goyawankeya|goyawankeya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:yawaterom|yawaterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:yawatemu|yawatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:yawateya|yawateya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokiyawaterom|gokiyawaterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokiyawatemu|gokiyawatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokiyawateya|gokiyawateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[present]] || [[word:yawawate|yawawate]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:yawawatesher|yawawatesher]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:yawawatesherĂ«m|yawawatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:yawawatero|yawawatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:yawawateshĂ«|yawawateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:yawawateshĂ«m|yawawateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokiyawawatero|gokiyawawatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokiyawawateshĂ«|gokiyawawateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokiyawawateshĂ«m|gokiyawawateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:goyawawankerom|goyawawankerom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goyawawankeshĂ«|goyawawankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goyawawankeshĂ«m|goyawawankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:goyawawankeya|goyawawankeya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:yawawaterom|yawawaterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:yawawatemu|yawawatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:yawawateya|yawawateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokiyawawaterom|gokiyawawaterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokiyawawatemu|gokiyawawatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokiyawawateya|gokiyawawateya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[present]] || [[word:yĂŠwĂŠte|yĂŠwĂŠte]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:yĂŠwĂŠtesher|yĂŠwĂŠtesher]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:yĂŠwĂŠtesherĂ«m|yĂŠwĂŠtesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:yĂŠwĂŠtero|yĂŠwĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:yĂŠwĂŠteshĂ«|yĂŠwĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:yĂŠwĂŠteshĂ«m|yĂŠwĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokiyĂŠwĂŠtero|gokiyĂŠwĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokiyĂŠwĂŠteshĂ«|gokiyĂŠwĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokiyĂŠwĂŠteshĂ«m|gokiyĂŠwĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:goyĂŠwĂŠnkerom|goyĂŠwĂŠnkerom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goyĂŠwĂŠnkeshĂ«|goyĂŠwĂŠnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goyĂŠwĂŠnkeshĂ«m|goyĂŠwĂŠnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:goyĂŠwĂŠnkeya|goyĂŠwĂŠnkeya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:yĂŠwĂŠterom|yĂŠwĂŠterom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:yĂŠwĂŠtemu|yĂŠwĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:yĂŠwĂŠteya|yĂŠwĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokiyĂŠwĂŠterom|gokiyĂŠwĂŠterom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokiyĂŠwĂŠtemu|gokiyĂŠwĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokiyĂŠwĂŠteya|gokiyĂŠwĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[present]] || [[word:yafwafte|yafwafte]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:yafwaftesher|yafwaftesher]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:yafwaftesherĂ«m|yafwaftesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:yafwaftero|yafwaftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:yafwafteshĂ«|yafwafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:yafwafteshĂ«m|yafwafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokiyafwaftero|gokiyafwaftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokiyafwafteshĂ«|gokiyafwafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokiyafwafteshĂ«m|gokiyafwafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:goyafwafnkerom|goyafwafnkerom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goyafwafnkeshĂ«|goyafwafnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goyafwafnkeshĂ«m|goyafwafnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:goyafwafnkeya|goyafwafnkeya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:yafwafterom|yafwafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:yafwaftemu|yafwaftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:yafwafteya|yafwafteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokiyafwafterom|gokiyafwafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokiyafwaftemu|gokiyafwaftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokiyafwafteya|gokiyafwafteya]]
|}

''76 forms generated.''

== See also ==
